name: Long March 8
description: Long March 8 (Chang Zheng 8) is a Chinese medium-lift launch vehicle developed by CASC for sun-synchronous and medium-inclination orbits. It reuses YF-100 and YF-75 propulsion from the Long March 5 and 7 families, and a reusable first-stage variant has been flight-tested as China explores booster recovery.
